name: rotiv
description: Rotiv AI-native full-stack framework CLI tools

tools.name: rotiv_new
tools.description: Create a new Rotiv project with all conventions in place

name.description: Project name (also used as directory name)

tools.name: rotiv_info
tools.description: Print framework version and project spec summary

tools.name: rotiv_add_route
tools.description: Scaffold an annotated route file at app/routes/<path>.tsx

tools.name: rotiv_add_model
tools.description: Scaffold an annotated model file at app/models/<name>.ts

name.description: Model name in PascalCase, e.g. 'Post' or 'UserProfile'

tools.name: rotiv_add_module
tools.description: Install a module (first-party or custom) at app/modules/<name>/

name.description: Module name in lowercase-hyphen format, e.g. 'auth', 'sessions', 'file-uploads'

tools.name: rotiv_spec_sync
tools.description: Sync .rotiv/spec.json with current filesystem state (routes, models, modules)

tools.name: rotiv_validate
tools.description: Run static analysis against framework rules, return structured diagnostics

tools.name: rotiv_explain
tools.description: Query the built-in knowledge base for a topic

topic.description: Topic name: routes, models, loader, action, middleware, signals, migrate, context, modules, deploy

tools.name: rotiv_diff_impact
tools.description: Analyze which routes are affected by changes to a file

generate_only.description: Generate migration files without applying them

check.description: Check for pending migrations without applying

tools.name: rotiv_deploy
tools.description: Deploy the project to a remote server via SSH

dry_run.description: Print deployment steps without executing them
